title: Slovakian-Style Turkey and Ham Dumplings
description: A hearty and flavorful Slovakian-inspired dish featuring turkey, ham, and homemade dumplings.
instructions: In a large skillet, sauté chopped onion and minced garlic until softened.
Add sliced Slovakian ham and cook until lightly browned.
Add diced turkey breast and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through.
In a large bowl, combine dumpling mix, beaten eggs, melted butter, salt, and black pepper. Mix until a dough forms.
Roll out dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch (6 mm).
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add dumplings and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Remove dumplings from water with a slotted spoon and add to the skillet with the turkey and ham mixture.
Simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the dumplings are well coated with the sauce.
